steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The question asks which statement most accurately describes Wilkerson's approach to documenting the Great Migration. The notes say she narrates the personal journeys of George Swanson Starling and Robert Pershing Foster, among others.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — 'describes the Great Migration itself': gives background on the migration but says nothing about Wilkerson's method of documenting it. ✗
  • Choice B — 'chronicles history by narrating individual journeys': directly matches the notes — she documents the complex history through personal narratives, citing Starling and Foster as examples. ✓
  • Choice C — 'lists the book's awards': mentions recognition the book received, not the author's documentary approach. ✗
  • Choice D — 'notes Starling appears in the book': identifies one subject but does not explain her method. ✗
That matches choice B — B is correct.
